title: OKE Formosa — Cluster Overview
description: OCI OKE Always Free · ARM64 · VM.Standard.A1.Flex (4 OCPU / 24 GB) · Flannel CNI

panels.title: CPU
panels.description: CPU cores used / allocatable (4 OCPUs)

panels.title: Memory
panels.description: Memory working set / allocatable (24 GiB)

panels.title: OOM Events
panels.description: OOM kill events in the last 24 hours

panels.title: Node Health — 10.0.1.212
panels.description: Kubernetes node conditions. Ready should be ✅, all others should be ✅ (no pressure).

panels.title: CPU — Usage vs Capacity (4 Cores)
panels.description: Container CPU usage vs node capacity (4 OCPUs) and allocatable

panels.title: Memory — Usage vs Capacity (24 GiB)
panels.description: Memory breakdown: Working Set (actual use), RSS (resident), Cache (page cache). Dashed lines show physical total and allocatable.

panels.title: Network I/O
panels.description: Network throughput. Transmitted shown as negative.

panels.title: Volume Usage
panels.description: PVC usage details. NFS-backed PVCs report the underlying NFS volume capacity, so 'Requested' shows the PVC-declared size.

targets.expr: sum by (persistentvolumeclaim, namespace) (kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes) / sum by (persistentvolumeclaim, namespace) (kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes)

panels.title: Services
panels.description: Kubernetes services across all namespaces

panels.title: Deployments
panels.description: Deployment replica status

panels.title: StatefulSets
panels.description: StatefulSet replica status

panels.title: Pod Phases
panels.description: Distribution of pods by lifecycle phase

panels.title: Container Restarts
panels.description: Hourly restart rate per pod. Only pods with restarts shown.

panels.title: Persistent Volumes
panels.description: PVC status and requested storage

panels.title: CPU by Pod
panels.description: CPU cores consumed by each pod (stacked)

panels.title: Memory by Pod
panels.description: Memory working set per pod (stacked)

panels.title: Network Receive by Pod
panels.description: Inbound network throughput per pod

panels.title: Network Transmit by Pod
panels.description: Outbound network throughput per pod

panels.title: Errors (24h)
panels.description: Total error-level log lines in the last 24 hours across all pods

panels.title: Warnings (24h)
panels.description: Total warning-level log lines in the last 24 hours across all pods

panels.title: Error & Warning Trend
panels.description: Error and warning log rate over time. Spikes indicate problems worth investigating.

panels.title: Recent Error Logs
panels.description: Shows recent error-level logs. When empty, no errors have been detected — that's good!

panels.title: Kubernetes Events
panels.description: Cluster events. Filter by Warning/Normal.
